sentences.target: Ich kippe Sand in den Blumentopf.

translations.de: Ich kippe Sand in den Blumentopf.
translations.en: I’m pouring sand into the flowerpot.
translations.es: Estoy echando arena en la maceta.
translations.fr: Je verse du sable dans le pot de fleurs.
translations.it: Sto versando della sabbia nel vaso.
translations.ru: Я насыпаю песок в цветочный горшок.
translations.vi: Tôi đang đổ cát vào chậu cây.
translations.nl: Ik doe zand in de bloempot.
translations.uk: Я насипаю пісок у квітковий горщик.
translations.hi: मैं गमले में रेत डाल रहा हूँ.
translations.id: Saya menuangkan pasir ke pot bunga.
translations.ja: 植木鉢に砂を入れている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive action of tipping/pouring.
Mass noun, masculine; accusative direct object of 'kippe' (no article used).
Two-way preposition; governs accusative here to mark direction/destination.
Definite article, masculine accusative singular; agrees with 'Blumentopf' as object of 'in'.
Masculine noun; accusative object of the preposition 'in' (destination). Compound of 'Blume' + 'Topf'.

sentences.target: Die Kinder bauen Burgen im Sand.

translations.de: Die Kinder bauen Burgen im Sand.
translations.en: The children are building castles in the sand.
translations.es: Los niños construyen castillos en la arena.
translations.fr: Les enfants construisent des châteaux de sable.
translations.it: I bambini costruiscono castelli di sabbia.
translations.yue: 啲小朋友喺沙度堆沙堡。
translations.pt: As crianças estão construindo castelos de areia.
translations.vi: Bọn trẻ đang xây lâu đài bằng cát.
translations.hi: बच्चे रेत के किले बना रहे हैं.
translations.el: Τα παιδιά φτιάχνουν κάστρα από άμμο.
translations.ja: 子どもたちが砂で城を作っている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative plural; modifies 'Kinder' (subject).
Plural noun, nominative; subject of 'bauen'.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; transitive.
Plural noun, accusative; direct object of 'bauen'.
Contraction of 'in dem'; two-way preposition selecting dative here to mark location.
Masculine noun, dative singular; object of the preposition 'im' indicating the medium/location.

sentences.target: Im Flur liegt Sand vom Spielplatz.

translations.de: Im Flur liegt Sand vom Spielplatz.
translations.en: In the hallway, there is sand from the playground.
translations.es: Hay arena del parque infantil en el pasillo.
translations.fr: Il y a du sable de l’aire de jeux dans le couloir.
translations.it: C’è sabbia del parco giochi nel corridoio.
translations.zh-Hans: 走廊里有从游乐场带进来的沙子。
translations.yue: 走廊度有喺遊樂場帶返嚟嘅沙。
translations.ru: В коридоре лежит песок, принесённый с детской площадки.
translations.pt: Há areia do parque infantil no corredor.
translations.tr: Koridorda oyun parkından gelen kum var.
translations.vi: Trong hành lang có cát từ sân chơi.
translations.ar: يوجد رمل من ساحة اللعب في الممر.
translations.nl: Er ligt zand van de speeltuin in de gang.
translations.uk: У коридорі лежить пісок із дитячого майданчика.
translations.hi: गलियारे में खेल के मैदान की रेत पड़ी है.
translations.pl: W korytarzu leży piasek z placu zabaw.
translations.el: Στον διάδρομο υπάρχει άμμος από την παιδική χαρά.
translations.nb: Det ligger sand fra lekeplassen i gangen.
translations.id: Di lorong ada pasir dari taman bermain.
translations.sv: Det ligger sand från lekplatsen i hallen.
translations.ro: În hol e nisip adus de la locul de joacă.
translations.cs: V chodbě je písek z hřiště.
translations.da: Der ligger sand fra legepladsen i gangen.
translations.ja: 廊下に公園からの砂がある。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of 'in dem'; two-way preposition selecting dative to mark location; fronted PP sets scene.
Masculine noun, dative singular; object of 'Im'.
Finite intransitive verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; verb-second with fronted PP.
Masculine noun, nominative singular; subject of 'liegt'.
Contraction of 'von dem'; preposition selecting dative to mark source/origin.
Masculine noun, dative singular; object of 'vom' indicating origin.

sentences.target: Der Sand ist heute sehr heiß.

translations.de: Der Sand ist heute sehr heiß.
translations.en: The sand is very hot today.
translations.es: La arena está muy caliente hoy.
translations.fr: Le sable est très chaud aujourd’hui.
translations.it: Oggi la sabbia è molto calda.
translations.pt: A areia está muito quente hoje.
translations.nl: Het zand is vandaag erg heet.
translations.el: Η άμμος είναι πολύ ζεστή σήμερα.
translations.nb: Sanden er veldig varm i dag.
translations.sv: Sanden är väldigt varm i dag.
translations.da: Sandet er meget varmt i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は砂がとても熱い。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; modifies 'Sand' (subject).
Masculine noun, nominative singular; subject.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person singular; links subject with predicate adjective.
Temporal adverb; modifies the clause, indicating time.
Degree adverb; intensifies the adjective 'heiß'.
Predicative adjective; complements the copula 'ist'.
